agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: More populous ZIP codes have more charities, increasing competition and slightly reducing log fundraising efficiency.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Rose-Ackerman (1982) outlines donor competition in populous/urban areas.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant but practically weak negative correlation was found. Nonprofits in high population ZIP codes face a very slight drop in log fundraising efficiency.
